assumptions.statement: ESP32-C3-MINI-1 provides >= 15 usable GPIO including 4 ADC1 channels sufficient for the pin map
assumptions.provenance: engineering familiarity with ESP32-C3 family; datasheet NOT in reviewed corpus
assumptions.resolution: import ESP32-C3-MINI-1 datasheet into corpus and re-verify pin-map.json

assumptions.statement: ADC full-scale ~2.5 V at 11 dB attenuation, 12-bit resolution
assumptions.provenance: family knowledge; datasheet not in corpus
assumptions.resolution: datasheet import + bench ADC linearity check

assumptions.statement: MCU active current ~80 mA (Wi-Fi off), idle ~15 mA
ESP32-C3-MINI-1 is locally sourceable in India at ~INR 180/unit and is not near end-of-life
assumptions.provenance: no vendor quote or lifecycle notice in corpus
assumptions.resolution: obtain two Indian distributor quotes + Espressif longevity statement

assumptions.statement: Battery derating factor 0.80 covers aging plus the 3.5 V discharge floor imposed by the LDO
TP4056-class charger at 500 mA program current stays within component temperature limits inside the enclosure
LDO effective thermal resistance ~250 K/W on the intended footprint
assumptions.provenance: engineering estimate for SOT-23-5 class package; datasheet not in corpus

assumptions.statement: Enclosure effective thermal resistance is unknown
assumptions.resolution: validation-plan tests 2-3; until then enclosure-temperature margins are requires_validation

assumptions.statement: Dark-well LDR divider midpoint sits inside the ADC calibrated range for the chosen 10k divider
Four token colors can be separated by nearest-centroid with margin over ambient drift and filament-batch variation
Bambu Lab A1 working volume is 256x256x256 mm
8.5-inch slate module envelope 226 x 146 x 5 mm with +/-0.5 mm tolerance
assumptions.provenance: common module estimate; vendor drawing not in corpus

assumptions.statement: PETG printed wall >= 2.4 mm with 0.4 mm nozzle survives classroom handling loads except drops (drops untested)
assumptions.provenance: no drop or load test exists

assumptions.resolution: measure across pilot batch (validation-plan test 15 companion data)

assumptions.statement: Assembly time 45 min at INR 150/h effective labor rate
BOM line prices in bom.csv are indicative small-batch Indian prices
30 mm token diameter reduces small-parts risk for ages 6-12
assumptions.provenance: no small-parts-cylinder test evidence; no certification claimed
assumptions.resolution: physical small-parts gauge check; keep supervised-use-only model regardless
